title: An Idol Wrestler Is Born!
overview: Pop princess Sakura is drawn into the brutal world of women's professional wrestling after sadistic lady brawler by the name of Rio humiliates one of her fellow idols!

title: Pro Debut!
overview: After some grueling training and an agonizing initiation ritual, Sakura makes her pro wrestling debut!

title: Give Up
overview: Sakura's heartbreaking losing streak reaches double digits, and her fans begin to lose faith. The idol considers quitting, but a sparring session with Misaki may change her mind!

title: Now This Is Pro Wrestling
overview: Thanks to some special training from Misaki, the beautiful and determined Sakura is ready for her next match! Will her hard work finally pay off?

title: The Night Before the Decisive Fight
overview: Sakura continues to push her body to the breaking point under the watchful eye of Misaki - but what she really needs is a signature move worthy of an idol!

title: Revenge Match
overview: Sakura finally turns her idol training into a formidable signature move. Basking in the glow of her first victory, the brawling beauty vows to work even harder!

title: The World Champion Comes to Japan
overview: The return of world champ Jackall Tojo - and an unexpected injury to Misaki - lands Sakura a coveted spot in a very special wrestling match!

title: The Power of the World Champ
overview: Despite her growing strength, improved technique, and signature move, Sakura is defeated by a true champion. Undaunted, the idol-turned-wrestler is eager for another shot at the top!

title: The Astounding Newbie
overview: A fighter with a background in karate officially joins the ranks, and Sakura is challenged by a mysterious masked wrestler!

title: Sakura's Fate
overview: Sakura must dig deep to overcome her opponent's karate skills, and the masked wrestler's shocking identity is finally revealed!

title: Pure Soul!
overview: Sakura and her old friend Elena pummel each other provocatively in sweaty, sexy grudge match for the ages!

title: To the World
overview: The spirited, and sadistic, match between Sakura and Elena reaches its epic, pulse-pounding climax!
